description: Plugin-distributed hooks for search-relevance-engineering. Auto-merged with the consumer's session hooks when the plugin is installed. Paths use ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT} so they resolve to the plugin's install location.

hooks.comment: Advisory: review this Search & Relevance Engineering deliverable against the §3 house opinions (baseline on every metric, source+date on every benchmark, no query/user PII). Set SEARCH_RELEVANCE_ENGINEERING_STRICT=1 to make it blocking.
